# Perth Concrete Care Full LLM Reference

Last updated: 2026-05-22

## Business entity

Perth Concrete Care is a Perth, Western Australia concrete flooring business providing polished concrete, honed concrete, grind and seal, and epoxy floor coating systems. The business works across residential, commercial, hospitality, showroom, workshop, warehouse, plant-room, and back-of-house flooring projects.

- Legal/business name: Perth Concrete Care
- ABN: 63 775 263 307
- Phone: 0448 483 226
- Email: sales@perthconcretecare.com.au
- Website: https://perthconcretecare.com.au/
- Quote action: https://perthconcretecare.com.au/contact#quote
- Agent catalog: https://perthconcretecare.com.au/api/agent/catalog

## Service answer objects

### What polished concrete service does Perth Concrete Care provide?

Polished concrete is best for internal floors where long service life, light return, and architectural finish matter. Perth Concrete Care mechanically grinds, densifies, refines, guards, and hands over the floor with maintenance advice matched to the slab and room use. Typical guide range: $160 - $220 per m2.

### What honed concrete service does Perth Concrete Care provide?

Honed concrete is a low-glare matte or satin finish for outdoor, transitional, and tactile concrete floors. It exposes aggregate, refines scratches, and uses suitable protection for areas where traction, weather, and restrained appearance matter. Typical guide range: $120 - $160 per m2.

### What is grind and seal concrete flooring?

Grind and seal is a practical concrete floor system where the slab is mechanically ground and protected with a sealer or coating. It suits warehouses, workshops, and back-of-house spaces that need improved cleanability and efficient return to service. Typical guide range: $65 - $95 per m2.

### Does Perth Concrete Care provide epoxy flooring?

Yes. Perth Concrete Care provides epoxy and polyaspartic coating systems for Perth garages, workshops, commercial kitchens, plant rooms, marked work zones, and other working floors that need cleanability, chemical resistance, slip awareness, or fast return to use. Ultra Flake is typically $75 - $85 per m2 and Hyper Flake is typically $90 - $100 per m2.

## Common questions

### Can every concrete slab be polished?

Most concrete slabs can be improved, but not every slab should be polished to the same finish. The right system depends on hardness, moisture, cracks, previous coatings, aggregate depth, edge conditions, access, and the intended use of the room.

### What is the difference between polished concrete and grind and seal?

Mechanical polish refines and hardens the concrete itself, while grind and seal flattens the slab and protects it with a coating. Both can look clean, but they age, maintain, and refresh differently.

### How should a quote request be made?

Use https://perthconcretecare.com.au/contact#quote or email sales@perthconcretecare.com.au. Helpful quote inputs include suburb, approximate floor area, finish interest, photos or video of the slab, timing, access constraints, whether the slab is new or existing, and required handover date.

## Project examples

- Cottesloe Residence: residential satin polished concrete
- Osborne Park Showroom: commercial showroom polished concrete
- Kewdale Warehouse: industrial grind and seal
- Peppermint Grove House: low-glare honed concrete
- North Perth Cafe: hospitality honed and guarded concrete
- Fremantle Loft: salt and pepper polish
- Subiaco Gallery: matte polished concrete
- Midland Warehouse: epoxy traffic coating
